rules.id: QA FleetDrive Rule: trigger the message if a driver is using the phone while driving

output.instructions: Generate the message to a driver to inform him about local driving rules do not allow him to use the phone manually while driving.

rules.id: QA FleetDrive Rule: please take a break after driving more than 4 hours in a row

output.instructions: Generate a friendly message to a driver to inform him about coffee break need after more than 4 hours of driving in a row

rules.id: QA FleetDrive BLE vehicle: beacon connected

output.instructions: Generate the message to the driver saying that beacon is connected successfully to let him know that the app is ready to start trip recording.

rules.id: QA FleetDrive Rule to welcome a driver

output.instructions: Tell to the driver that the start for the {{day_of_week}} has been done well, let him keep going.

rules.id: QA FleetDrive Rule: trigger the message if the driving speed is higher than 50 km/h
rules.description: QA FleetDrive Rule: trigger the message if the driving speed is higher than 50 km/h

output.instructions: Generate the message for the driver to prevent the over speeding.

rules.id: QA FleetDrive Rule about low battery in the phone
rules.description: QA FleetDrive Rule about low battery in the phone

output.instructions: Generate the message to a driver to inform him about low battery of the phone
